---
title : "The Path toward Ethical Science Is Paved with Diamonds"
date : "2026-02-01"
author : ["Nate Breznau"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Bulletin of Computer and Data Sciences, 7(1) 1--10  [https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1](https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1)"
publication_short : "Bulletin of Computer and Data Sciences, 7(1) 1--10  [https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1](https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Nate Breznau (2026). *The Path toward Ethical Science Is Paved with Diamonds*. Bulletin of Computer and Data Sciences, 7(1) 1--10  [https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1](https://doi.org/10.71448/bcds2671-1)

:::
